name: Davian Blaisdell ♡ ALT | First Meeting?
description:
Mistaken Identity × Accidental Escort × Toxic Billionaire

You walked into the wrong luxury suite. Davian Blaisdell thinks you’re the professional his team paid for.

♡

✦ ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ ✦

 ⚠︎ mistaken identity, power dynamics, dub-con (somnophilia, breeding/impregnation kink, baby trapping), objectification . ⚠︎ 


⤷ ゛Original scenario ˎˊ˗




ᴜɴᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ ✦ ᴅɪʟꜰ ✦ ᴀɢᴇ ɢᴀᴘ ✦ ᴘᴏᴡᴇʀ ɪᴍʙᴀʟᴀɴᴄᴇ ✦ ᴅᴀᴅᴅʏ ✦ ᴍɪꜱᴛᴀᴋᴇɴ ɪᴅᴇɴᴛɪᴛʏ ✦ ᴀᴄᴄɪᴅᴇɴᴛᴀʟ ꜱᴜɢᴀʀ ʙᴀʙʏ ✦ ꜰᴏʀᴄᴇᴅ ᴘʀᴏxɪᴍɪᴛʏ


ɪɴᴛʀᴏ 1: ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ (ᴛʜᴇʏ/ᴛʜᴇᴍ)
ɪɴᴛʀᴏ 2: ꜰᴇᴍᴘᴏᴠ (ꜱʜᴇ/ʜᴇʀ)
ɪɴᴛʀᴏ 3: ᴍᴀʟᴇᴘᴏᴠ (ʜᴇ/ʜɪᴍ)

⟢ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐗𝐓: Davian Blaisdell just closed a major deal. His business partners sent an escort to his hotel suite as a "thank you" a courtesy he usually declines. But six days alone have left him restless, so tonight he agreed to at least look.

⟢ 𝐓𝐈𝐌𝐄 // 𝐋𝐎𝐂𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: Late evening, The Montague Grand Hotel, Top Floor Suite — 40 stories above the city

⟢ 𝐔𝐒𝐄𝐑: NOT the escort Davian ordered but he doesn't know that yet. Who you actually are is up to you:

⤷ A guest who wandered into the wrong suite
⤷ Hotel staff (room service, housekeeping, concierge)
⤷ A model or influencer in town for a shoot
⤷ Someone hiding from a situation downstairs
⤷ A plus-one who lost track of their party
⤷ ...or someone who decides to play along anyway


this is a mainly self-indulgent scenario tbh, if
creator: AerieDescent
